productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Charcoal Sweater
description: Composition Charcoal V-neck sweater with blue, white and yellow stripes, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbing around the neck and hem and branding appliquéd above the hemline Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean or hand wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Dry flat in shade only use a steam iron if needed Stylish to the hilt and offering snug warmth, this sweater from US Polo makes a great addition to your wardrobe. The cotton fabric makes it an all seasons favourite. Complement this stylish and extremely comfortable sweater with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
